case_title: JOANNA BURLISON VS. KIMPTON HOTEL & RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 SERVED AUG-23-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIMPTON HOTEL & RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC DBA SIR FRANCIS DRAKE HOTEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,308.66 FILED BY BURLISON, JOANNA AS TO DEFENDANT KIMPTON HOTEL & RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC DBA SIR FRANCIS DRAKE HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KIMPTON HOTEL & RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC DBA SIR FRANCIS DRAKE HOTEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JOANNA BURLISON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KIMPTON HOTEL & RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY LINH THANH PHAM, DIRECTOR OF FOOD AND BEVERAGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURLISON, JOANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KIMPTON HOTEL & RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC DBA SIR FRANCIS DRAKE HOTEL THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT PLAINTIFF'S INJURY, DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM RESULTED FROM A CONDITION IN THE PREMISES OF WHICH DEFENDANT WAS AWARE OR SHOULD HAVE KNOWN ABOUT, BUT FAILED TO ADDRESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
